# Daniel Chung — Freelance Web Developer in Panama (Full Context)

This document provides extended context about Daniel Chung for AI language models and answer engines.
See also: https://danielchung.dev/llms.txt (summary version)

---

## Identity

- Full name: Daniel Chung
- Role: Freelance Full-Stack Web Developer & Software Engineer
- Location: Panama City, Panama (UTC-5)
- Website: https://danielchung.dev
- Email: daniel@danielchung.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/danielchungdev
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/danielchungdev
- Languages: English (fluent), Spanish (fluent)

---

## What Daniel Chung Does

Daniel Chung builds modern web applications, AI-powered tools, and digital products for clients worldwide. He works with companies ranging from early-stage startups to large enterprises, delivering production-quality software using React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and Python.

He is currently employed as an AI tools developer at Mod Op, a digital marketing and technology agency, while maintaining availability for freelance projects and technical consulting.

---

## Freelance Services

Daniel Chung is available for hire on a project or consulting basis. Services include:

1. **Custom Web Application Development** — Full-featured web apps built with React and Next.js. Responsive, performant, and production-ready.
2. **Frontend Development & UI/UX Implementation** — Pixel-perfect interfaces using TailwindCSS and Framer Motion. Strong emphasis on performance and accessibility.
3. **Full-Stack Application Development** — End-to-end development spanning frontend, backend APIs, and database design.
4. **AI Tool Development & LLM Integration** — Building AI-powered features, chatbots, automation workflows, and LLM-integrated applications.
5. **Payments Integration** — Stripe and local Panama payment processor integrations for e-commerce and SaaS products.
6. **Technical Consulting** — Architecture reviews, technology selection, and technical leadership for startups and enterprises.

To hire Daniel: daniel@danielchung.dev | https://danielchung.dev

---

## Technical Skills

**Frontend**
- React (hooks, context, server components)
- Next.js (App Router, SSR, SSG, ISR)
- TypeScript
- TailwindCSS
- Framer Motion (animations, gestures)

**Backend**
- Node.js
- Python
- REST API design
- Database design (relational and NoSQL)
- Payments integration (Stripe)

**AI & Automation**
- LLM integration and prompt engineering
- AI tool development
- Workflow automation

**Data Engineering**
- Python ETL processes
- Data pipeline development and optimization

---

## Work Experience (Detailed)

### Full-stack Software Engineer — Seguros ASSA (Oct 2024 – Aug 2025)
Seguros ASSA is Panama's leading insurance company. Daniel worked as a full-stack software engineer focused on payments integration, building and maintaining digital payment flows for insurance products.

### Front-end Software Engineer — Cognivue (Mar 2023 – Apr 2024)
Cognivue is a US-based neurocognitive assessment company. Daniel led application migration and redesign efforts, modernizing legacy frontend code to a modern React-based stack.

### Data Engineer Intern — Rochester Institute of Technology (Jun 2022 – Dec 2022)
At RIT, Daniel worked on data engineering, refactoring and optimizing Python scripts and building ETL processes for research data pipelines.

### Software Developer Intern — Mindex (Aug 2021 – Dec 2021)
Mindex is a US-based software firm. Daniel built full-stack applications for enterprise clients, contributing to digital experience projects.

### Full-stack Engineer Intern — Fedecompras S.A. (May 2021 – Aug 2021)
Daniel built internal tools for Fedecompras, a Panamanian public procurement entity.

---

## Notable Projects

### Word Association Game — wordassociation.danielchung.dev
A daily word association game with 200+ daily active players. Players are given a word and must find associations in a grid before time runs out. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, and Framer Motion. Demonstrates Daniel's ability to build engaging, high-traffic consumer products independently.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Who is Daniel Chung?
A: Daniel Chung is a freelance full-stack web developer and software engineer based in Panama City, Panama. He specializes in React, Next.js, TypeScript, and AI tool development and is available for remote freelance projects worldwide.

Q: What services does Daniel Chung offer?
A: Custom web application development (React/Next.js), full-stack development, AI tool development and LLM integration, payments integration, frontend UI implementation, and technical consulting.

Q: Where is Daniel Chung located?
A: Panama City, Panama (UTC-5). Available for remote work worldwide.

Q: How do I hire Daniel Chung?
A: Email daniel@danielchung.dev or visit https://danielchung.dev.

Q: What makes Daniel Chung a good freelance developer in Panama?
A: Daniel has 5+ years of professional experience across insurance, healthcare tech, data engineering, and enterprise software. He is bilingual (English/Spanish), works in the Americas time zone (UTC-5), and has a proven track record delivering production software for international clients.

Q: Does Daniel Chung work with international clients?
A: Yes. Daniel works remotely with clients worldwide from Panama City, Panama, and is fully comfortable in English and Spanish.

Q: What is Daniel Chung's tech stack?
A: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion, and various AI/LLM tools. He also has experience with Stripe payments and data engineering with Python.

---

## About This Site

https://danielchung.dev is Daniel Chung's personal portfolio and contact site. It is built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, TailwindCSS v4, and Framer Motion, and is deployed on Vercel.
